gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewed the storage ownership inversion and found two compatibility gaps: legacy reader classes inherited document class methods that could be affected by public monkeypatches, and document root storage helpers were lazily routed but absent from root star-imports. The legacy wrapper now owns the relevant constructor and mutation methods, document root __all__ includes the document storage exports, and regression tests cover both fixes before merge.

issues.resolution: Overrode MemoryRangeReader.__init__, MemoryRangeReader.put, DiskRangeReader.__init__, and UnityCatalogVolumeRangeReader.__init__ in the legacy wrapper and added a regression that monkeypatches the public class methods.
issues.summary: Public document class monkeypatches could still affect legacy reader construction and mutation through inherited methods.

issues.resolution: Extended document_kv_cache root __all__ with explicit document-owned root exports and added star-import assertions for storage readers and helpers.
issues.summary: Document root storage helpers were routed for attribute access but omitted from root star-imports.

scope: UC Volume and DBFS path resolution
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_storage.py tests/test_planner_materializer.py tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py -q

python -m py_compile src/document_kv_cache/storage.py src/restaurant_kv_serving/storage.py src/document_kv_cache/__init__.py tests/test_storage.py tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py
find src tests -name '*.py' -print0 | xargs -0 python -m py_compile
PYTHONPATH=src poetry run python -m document_kv_cache.pr_evidence --validate-directory pr-evidence
repository secret scan over README, package metadata, source, tests, Databricks helpers, PR evidence, and GitHub metadata
GPT-5.5 review and re-review after resolving storage compatibility findings
what_changed: Moved memory, disk, Unity Catalog Volume, and routed range reader implementation into document_kv_cache.storage.
Routed document_kv_cache root storage symbols to the document-owned module.
Turned restaurant_kv_serving.storage into a compatibility wrapper over the document module.
Preserved UC Volume and DBFS path confinement, checksum validation, legacy helper monkeypatch behavior, and the previous legacy star-import surface.
Added regressions for legacy class monkeypatch isolation and document root star-import storage exports.
why: The generalized package should own KV shard access and URI resolution because those paths are core to document-generic cache materialization. Keeping legacy compatibility makes this an incremental, behavior-preserving step toward retiring restaurant-specific implementation ownership.
